title: Referral Program

content:
Squash is a social game, and as a member-owned club, we would love it if you invited your friends to come play.

To encourage everyone to bring their friends out, we credit each one of our members with 2 free guest passes in their account annually. If you refer a new member to the club who signs up for a monthly membership, not only will we add a $50 club credit to your account which can be used at the pro-shop or for food or drink from the front desk.

You can either just let us know at the front desk when you sign up, or you can fill out the form on our Free Trial page, choose Referred by a friend from the “how did you hear about us” field, and a box will show up where you can have your friend fill in your name.
